theme: Mean reversion to the midpoint of the 9:30 candle
method: Subject = 9:30-9:45 candle. Midpoint = (H + L) / 2. Track whether subsequent 15m bars' ranges straddle that midpoint within three windows.
key_finding: About 65% of days mean-revert to the 9:30 midpoint within 30 min. By RTH close, 79% of days touch the midpoint. ~21% of days never return to the opening candle's center — those are the 'expand and never look back' days where the open's directional read holds.
